hypotheses_ranked.summary: Kubernetes node is reporting disk pressure

recommended_next_steps: Inspect image filesystem, container logs, and eviction events.
Check whether pressure is on nodefs or imagefs.
Confirm whether cleanup automation is running.
disk-pressure.summary: Kubernetes node is reporting disk pressure
unsafe_actions_avoided: Did not run disallowed first-response command: kubectl drain.
Did not run disallowed first-response command: kubectl cordon.
Did not run disallowed first-response command: kubectl delete pod.
Safety policy observed: Do not drain or cordon a node without platform owner approval.
Safety policy observed: Do not delete pods during initial diagnosis.
Safety policy observed: Confirm disruption budgets and workload criticality before recommending relocation.

hypotheses_ranked.summary: Kubernetes node is reporting memory pressure

recommended_next_steps: Inspect pods on the node by memory request, limit, and recent restarts.
Check kubelet eviction events and node allocatable memory.
Decide whether workload relocation is needed with platform owner approval.
